---
title: "kumeleme"
output: html_document
date: ""
---


```{r}
veri <- read.csv("veri.csv", sep = ";")
```


```{r}
veri$Sleep_Duration <- as.numeric(gsub(",", ".", veri$Sleep_Duration))
```


```{r}
str(veri)

```


```{r}
df1 <- veri[,c("Age","Sleep_Duration","Quality_Sleep","Activity_Level","Stress_Level","Heart_Rate","Daily_Steps")]
```

```{r}
library(dendextend)
```


```{r}
cor_matris <- cor(df1)
print(cor_matris)
```

```{r}
d <- dist(df1, method = "euclidean")
fit <- hclust(d, method="ward.D") 
dend<-as.dendrogram(fit) 
plot(dend)
```



```{r}
geneldend<-dend %>%
  set("branches_lwd", 2) %>%
  set("branches_k_color", k = 3)%>%
  set("labels_cex", 1.2)%>%
  set("labels_colors",k=3)
plot(geneldend,font.axis = 2, type="triangle")
```
